g.text: VIRTUAL MEMORY SIMULATOR: SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE & DATA LAYOUT

ol.li: VA Generation: CPU generates 32-bit Virtual Address.

TLB Search: MMU checks TLB using VPN + ASID.
Hit: Return PFN immediately.
Miss: Proceed to Page Table Walk.
Radix Walk: CR3 points to L1 Directory. Use bits [31-22] for PDE, [21-12] for PTE.
Fault Logic: If Present bit is 0, trap to Kernel.
Swap I/O: Kernel fetches data from Disk, updates PTE, and refills TLB.
Final Access: Concatenate PFN with Offset [11-0] to access RAM.

g.title: Handles address translation and TLB lookup

g.text: PFN_0 | P | W | U | D | A
PFN_1 | P | W | U | D | A
PFN_1023 | P | W | U | D | A

g.title: Handles address translation and TLB lookup
